name: tpl-contract-review
description: Contract Review + E-Sign Pipeline — OCR contract, AI risk analysis, route to legal or DocuSign. Replace OCR externalUrl with your provider (e.g. AWS Textract, Google Document AI). Replace DocuSign externalUrl with https://api.docusign.com/v2.1/accounts/{accountId}/envelopes.

steps.notifyMsg: Contract review for {{counterparty_name}} ({{contract_type}}, {{deal_value}}) requires legal review. Risk level: {{steps.review-contract.output.risk_level}}. Summary: {{steps.review-contract.output.risk_summary}}. Flagged clauses: {{steps.review-contract.output.flagged_clauses}}.
Contract signed by {{counterparty_name}}. Type: {{contract_type}}, Deal value: {{deal_value}}. Envelope ID: {{steps.send-for-signature.output.envelope_id}}.
